ab: mpitu tmuting mosa cu pwasan briu kisa.
en: I arrived at school at seven today.

ab: t’aring tkba biru la, miyuk sali pwasan psba briu, kmayan p’aras gluw maha, tuli! tatuk tunux.
ch: 上課了，老師走進教室，班長說:「起立!敬禮!」
en: It’s time for class , the teacher walked into the classroom, and the monitor said: “Stand up! Salute!”

ab: hopa hngiyan myan maha, psba biru lokah su.
t’aring tkba biru lga, sba’an cami nya psba biru biru lpgan na ke atayan.
ch: 上課的時候，老師教我們數字的族語。
en: In class, the teacher taught us the atayan language of numbers.

ab: mlu cami psba biru lmpu, m’was cami ’was na biru lpgan.
ch: 我們跟著老師唸，我們唱了數字歌。
en: We followed the teacher to read, we sang the number song.

ab: waya mu ba’un piyux ci ke atayan.
en: I have learned many atayan languages.

ab: mosa cu m’was biru utux utux rayx, tkba cu ke atayan utux utux ryax, aki pungan yaya mu.
ch: 我天天上學，我天天學族語，我要講給媽媽聽。
en: I go to school every day, I learn the atayan language every day, and I want to tell my mother.
